---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a new feature or improvement for CoSeeker
title: "[Feature]: "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

## Problem

What problem does this feature solve?

## Proposed solution

Describe the feature or improvement you want.

## Why this matters for CoSeeker / K4M2A

Explain how this supports the mission of CoSeeker or K4M2A.

Examples:

- Helps seekers find better communities
- Improves safety or moderation
- Reduces engagement-driven behavior
- Improves reflection, learning, or human development
- Makes the app easier for contributors or users

## User experience

Describe how this should work from the user’s perspective.

## Possible implementation

If you have a technical idea, describe it here.

## Alternatives considered

Are there other ways to solve this problem?

## Additional context

Add screenshots, examples, links, or related issues if useful.
